name: ai-infra-controller-probe
description: Keyless Docker preflight and signed macOS Seatbelt sentinel for Codex controller boundaries.

interface.longDescription: Runs a zero-model Docker preflight or a signed macOS Seatbelt sentinel with zero source mutation, disposable controls, and postflight bindings, while keeping controller, namespace, signer, model-absence, and outcome claims explicitly unverified.
defaultPrompt: Run the signed keyless macOS Seatbelt sentinel without mutating the source snapshot, then explain its component-only evidence boundary.
